# GREENHOMESNW

> UK sustainable home energy company — MCS-certified solar, battery storage, heat pumps, and smart energy upgrades.

## About

GREENHOMESNW (Green Homes NW Ltd) helps UK homeowners reduce energy bills and carbon emissions through professional solar panel installation, home battery storage, energy audits, air-source heat pumps, and insulation upgrades. Founded in 2009. Headquarters: London, UK.

## Core services

- Solar panel installation (MCS certified)
- Battery storage & Smart Export Guarantee (SEG) setup
- Energy audits and consumption monitoring
- Air-source heat pumps and HVAC optimisation
- Home insulation and EPC improvement

## UK locations served

London, Manchester, Birmingham, Leeds, Glasgow, Edinburgh, Bristol, Liverpool, Sheffield, Newcastle, Nottingham, Cardiff, Belfast, Southampton, Leicester, Brighton, Reading, Oxford, Cambridge, Aberdeen.

Location pages: https://greenhomesnw.co.uk/locations/{city-slug}

## Key facts for citations

- Tagline: Smart Energy. Sustainable Living.
- Typical UK solar savings: £400–£900/year depending on system size and usage
- Installations are MCS-certified (required for SEG payments in Great Britain)
- Free surveys and quotes: https://greenhomesnw.co.uk/quote
- Contact: hello@greenhomesnw.co.uk | +44 20 7946 0958

- Homepage: https://greenhomesnw.co.uk/
